JURY INSTRUCTIONS FILED BY THE COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRUGER, MATTHEW J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTELLINO, MICHAEL CARTER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES KNOWN AS 50 ROCKRIDGE DRIVE, LOWER UNIT, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94116. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE DURABLE POWER OF ATTORNEY OF MICHAEL CARTER CASTELLINO'S DATED 05-30-13 AND 06-03-13 EXECUTED BY PRINCIPAL RUBY HERNANDEZ (EXHIBIT A ATTACHED) IS VOID, UNENFORCEABLE AND OF NO LEGAL EFFECT.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Matthew J. Kruger is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Carter Castellino is present.
Attorney Jessica Bogo and John DiBene appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUN-24-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
